name: Impossible Taco Pie
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 400°F. Grease pie plate, 10" diameter, or square baking dish, 8x8". Cook and stir the ground beef and onion in a skillet until beef is brown; drain. Stir in taco seasoning mix; spoon into pie plate. Beat baking mix, milk, and eggs together with a wire whisk or hand beater for about 1 minute, until almost smooth. Pour into pie plate. Bake about 25 minutes or until knife inserted in center comes out clean. Sprinkle with cheese. Bake about 2 more minutes or until cheese is melted. Cool 5 minutes. Garnish with lettuce, tomatoe slices, and olives.
For half the recipe: Use a 1/2 quart square or round casserole dish. Decrease baking mix to 1/2 cup, milk to 3/4 cup, and eggs to 1. Divide remaining ingredient amounts in half. Reduce whisking time to about 10 seconds in a blender or 30 seconds with a wire whisk or hand beater. Increase bake time to 30-35 minutes. No other adjustments necessary.
